Merritt Island restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Merritt Island restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 18 Merritt Island restaurants we grade, 13 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Merritt Island restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Merritt Island?

We currently publish 18 graded restaurants in Merritt Island, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 13 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
